frame_analyses.description: Initial laparoscopic view showing curved needle and suture material entering field
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture appears to be appropriate 2-0 silk material

frame_analyses.description: Right needle driver grasping needle, left grasper present
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Needle held at appropriate distance from tip, good instrument positioning

frame_analyses.description: Instruments positioned over what appears to be Penrose drain with marked locations
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Blue suture visible, drain appears properly positioned

frame_analyses.description: Needle being passed through drain tissue at first marked location
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Needle trajectory appears perpendicular to tissue surface

frame_analyses.description: Beginning of knot formation, instruments manipulating suture for first throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Surgeon's knot formation initiated, appropriate suture length visible

frame_analyses.description: Completing surgeon's knot double throw with right hand leading
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean double throw formation, good tension control

frame_analyses.description: Single throw formation with left hand leading
Final single throw with right hand leading
Scissors cutting suture tails close to knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Both tails being cut appropriately short

penalties.description: Entry point appears approximately 1-2mm from optimal mark position

knot_assessments.notes: Clean surgeon's knot formation with appropriate double throw

confidence_rationale: Good visualization of overall technique and knot sequence. Suture placement assessment limited by camera angle and resolution for precise measurement of deviation from marks.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation measurements due to video resolution and camera angle
Precise suture mark locations due to image quality
technique_summary: Excellent intermediate-level performance with proper surgeon's knot formation, consistent hand switching, and efficient completion time. Minor deviation in suture placement.
strengths: Excellent knot tying technique with proper surgeon's knot
Efficient overall completion time of 148 seconds
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise needle placement at marked locations
Consider slightly slower approach to suture placement for improved accuracy
